summary: Iteration 63: Tested Operations Assistant Bot (OrderBot) feature - all 16 backend API tests pass, frontend UI verified working. Bot displays proactive alerts, responds to commands (status, stuck, missing, production, help), and search functionality works correctly.

success_rate.backend: 100% (16/16 tests passed, 2 skipped due to no ready_to_dispatch orders)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 tested the Operations Assistant Bot (OrderBot) feature. Key findings: 1) All bot API endpoints work correctly: /api/bot/daily-briefing, /api/bot/queue-health, /api/bot/stuck-orders, /api/bot/missing-data, /api/bot/production-suggestions, /api/bot/search, /api/bot/update-field, /api/bot/upload-file, /api/bot/dispatch, /api/bot/customer-history/{phone}. 2) Bot widget appears for admin/accountant users after login (uses token polling). 3) Welcome message shows Quick Status with stuck orders, missing invoices, and new Amazon orders. 4) Commands work: 'status' shows Operations Summary, 'stuck' shows stuck orders list, 'missing' shows data gaps, 'production' shows stock suggestions, 'help' shows all commands. 5) Search finds orders by ID, phone, or name across pending_fulfillment, dispatches, and amazon_orders collections. 6) Bot position is bottom-20 right-6 to avoid Emergent badge. Note: Form data endpoints require proper multipart encoding (not JSON).

daily_briefing_api.details: GET /api/bot/daily-briefing returns summary with stuck_ready_to_dispatch, missing_invoices, missing_tracking, stuck_awaiting_stock, new_amazon_orders

queue_health_api.details: GET /api/bot/queue-health returns pending_fulfillment stats, missing_data counts, amazon_orders stats, dispatched today count

stuck_orders_api.details: GET /api/bot/stuck-orders returns ready_to_dispatch and awaiting_stock lists with days_stuck field

missing_data_api.details: GET /api/bot/missing-data returns invoices, tracking_ids, shipping_labels, phone_numbers, addresses with counts and order lists

production_suggestions_api.details: GET /api/bot/production-suggestions returns suggestions with severity (critical/warning/info), current_stock, pending_orders

search_api.details: POST /api/bot/search returns enriched results with known_fields, missing_fields, _source, _source_display

update_field_api.details: POST /api/bot/update-field updates order fields, returns remaining_fields and is_complete status

upload_file_api.details: POST /api/bot/upload-file uploads invoice/shipping_label files to orders

bot_widget_visibility.details: OrderBot toggle button appears for admin/accountant users after login

welcome_message.details: Bot displays welcome message with Quick Status showing stuck orders, missing invoices, new Amazon orders

status_command.details: Bot responds to 'status' command with Operations Summary (URGENT, ATTENTION, TODAY sections)

stuck_command.details: Bot responds to 'stuck' command with stuck orders list (Ready to Dispatch and Awaiting Stock)

search_functionality.details: Bot search finds orders by ID, phone, or name - tested with 'test' query returning 10 results
